subcodes.first_line: May our esteemed Sir Maṭūshaqaf remain safeguarded and protected beneath the shelter of the Lord, and blessed by His divine favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سرکار ماطوشقف صاحب در صون حمایت پروردگار محفوظ و مصون باشند و بالطاف کردگار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
